# StarRiver Arts

> Public static site for StarRiver Arts projects, including the VR Racing Club section on GitHub Pages.

## Primary sections

- [VR Racing Club](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/): community overview, Time Attack entry, and Events entry.
- [VR Racing Club machine guide](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/llms.txt): focused guide for Racing Club pages and data files.

## Notes

- The site is bilingual Traditional Chinese / English.
- Some Racing Club detail views still use shared HTML shells with query-string parameters while loading JSON data client-side.
